shopping_68.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to click on the "Reviews (12)" tab on the product page. The reviews were likely hidden behind this tab, and simply scrolling down did not reveal them.
shopping_68.REFLECTION: When navigating a product page to find reviews, always look for and click on a dedicated "Reviews" tab or link to display the review content. Do not assume reviews will be visible by just scrolling on the main product details page.
shopping_68.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent failed to click on the "Reviews (12)" tab on the product page. The reviews were likely hidden behind this tab, and simply scrolling down did not reveal them.

REFLECTION:
When navigating a product page to find reviews, always look for and click on a dedicated "Reviews" tab or link to display the review content. Do not assume reviews will be visible by just scrolling on the main product details page.
